examples.title: Pseudocode: 2D Array Initialization
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Initialize2DArray
INPUT: rows, columns
OUTPUT: initialized 2D array

BEGIN
 FOR i FROM 0 TO rows - 1 DO
 FOR j FROM 0 TO columns - 1 DO
 array[i][j] = 0
 END FOR
 END FOR
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates how to initialize a 2D array with zeros.

examples.title: Python: 2D Array Initialization
examples.code:
def initialize_2d_array(rows, columns):
 return [[0 for _ in range(columns)] for _ in range(rows)]

# Example usage:
array = initialize_2d_array(3, 4)
print(array)
examples.explanation: This Python code defines a function to initialize a 2D array with zeros.

examples.title: C: 2D Array Initialization
examples.explanation: This C code defines a function to initialize a 2D array with zeros.
